nodes.name: 乌干达
nodes.summary: 乌干达是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联249种鸟类，包括南非鸭、Elgon francolin、Shelley's francolin等249种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Yellow-vented eremomela
nodes.summary: Yellow-vented eremomela（Eremomela flavicrissalis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Yellow-vented eremomela。

nodes.name: Yellow-vented eremomela
nodes.summary: The yellow-vented eremomela (Eremomela flavicrissalis) is a species of bird formerly placed in the "Old World warbler" assemblage, but now placed in the family Cisticolidae. It is found in dry savannas in Ethiopia, Kenya, Somalia, Tanzania, and Uganda. References
